fault_hypothesis: On line 56, when the counter exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of `cap`, so the counter is clamped one below the intended ceiling.

constraints.intent: After clamping, the counter should equal cap exactly, not cap-1.
After the clamping branch executes, the counter must equal cap, not cap-1.

spec.expr: cap is None or counters__1[key__1] <= cap

constraints.intent: Before using counters__1, the value must not exceed cap if cap is set.
The returned counter value must never exceed the cap.
